Declares a global function `setTimeout` for the JerryScript mbed drivers.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that declares a global function `setTimeout` for use with the JerryScript engine in an mbed environment. The file includes the `wrap_tools.h` header from the `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry`, which suggests that it is part of a library that integrates JerryScript with mbed OS. The `DECLARE_GLOBAL_FUNCTION` macro is used to register the `setTimeout` function, making it available globally within the JavaScript context managed by JerryScript. The header guards `_JERRYSCRIPT_MBED_DRIVERS_SET_TIMEOUT_H` prevent multiple inclusions of this file, ensuring that the function declaration is processed only once during compilation.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry/wrap_tools.h`
